scripts.deps: dotnet restore && dotnet tool restore && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.infra.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.infra.yml up -d postgres
scripts.ef:add: dotnet ef migrations add --project src/ContactManager.Infrastructure --startup-project src/ContactManager.Infrastructure --output-dir Persistence/Migrations
scripts.ef:update: dotnet ef database update --project src/ContactManager.Infrastructure --startup-project src/ContactManager.Infrastructure
